vocab.meaning: phản hồi xúc giác (cảm giác phím nảy lại)
vocab.example: I prefer using a mechanical keyboard because the tactile feedback significantly enhances my typing experience.

vocab.meaning: thiết kế công thái học (tối ưu cho tư thế)
vocab.example: Since I spend hours at my desk, I invested in a keyboard with an ergonomic design to prevent wrist strain.

vocab.meaning: các tác vụ đánh máy cường độ cao
vocab.example: For intensive typing tasks like coding or essay writing, a full-sized desktop keyboard is far more efficient.
Laptops offer unparalleled portability, allowing me to stay productive even when I'm working from a local cafe.

vocab.meaning: thiết bị ngoại vi (bàn phím, chuột rời...)
vocab.example: I usually connect my laptop to a high-quality peripheral device to enhance my comfort during long work sessions.
After years of practice, my muscle memory allows me to type at a rapid pace without even glancing at the keys.

vocab.meaning: bố cục chật chội (phím sát nhau)
vocab.example: I sometimes struggle with the cramped layout of ultra-thin laptops, which often leads to annoying typos.

vocab.meaning: độ lún của phím (khoảng cách phím di chuyển)
vocab.example: The deep key travel on my desktop keyboard makes it much more satisfying to use than shallow laptop keys.

vocab.meaning: tối ưu hóa quy trình làm việc
vocab.example: Having a dedicated workstation with a responsive keyboard helps me significantly streamline my workflow.

vocab.meaning: độ chính xác khi đánh máy
vocab.example: A well-spaced desktop keyboard can greatly improve your typing accuracy compared to a small laptop interface.
